Patch Set 3:

1. Bumping the version of the runtime-web from 1.0.0 to 1.0.1 will not change anything, although I can do that.

2. I believe the runtime-core is still at 1.0.0 which is the default since it never had a version tag.   Hence, the runtime-web references runtime-core 1.0.0
If we want 1.0.1 across runtimeapi, runtime-core, runtime-web, I will update accordingly.
